emails.subject: Re: Swap deal with EPMI Long Term Hedge
emails.subject_base: Swap deal with EPMI Long Term Hedge
emails.body: Re: Swap deal with EPMI Long Term Hedge I didn't think we were confirming transactions between books, but maybe this is a first that crossed company lines I would think we would confirm it through RMT as one ENA RMT trade and another RMT EPMI trade. I'm assuming that the reference to EPMI Long Term Hedge is an EnronOnline reference to one of the EPMI trading desks and therefore it should be done as an EPMI trade. Tana Jones 08/21/2000 04:14 PM
